title: jasminum oliganthum
intro: Jasminum oliganthum, also known as the small-flowered jasmine or miniature jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are beneficial in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Herbal preparations of Jasminum oliganthum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
